title: Aug 2023 thoughts — the Jo breakup post-mortem (kids, pedicure date, Beef show, Salem trip)
html:
Aug 2023 thoughts — the Jo breakup post-mortem (kids, pedicure date, Beef show, Salem trip)

Source: 2023-08-02 Google Doc. Yahir on the road back from the Kentucky trip with Cameron, processing the Jo breakup that just happened. The most detailed relationship-debrief in the corpus prior to the Sam breakup.

TL;DR

  • Trigger observation: watching little kids interact with the world makes Yahir tear up — "It is an observation in raw human existence" / "I want to foster the best outcome for my future kids, be playful, be present."
  • The Jo arc (chronological):
    • Beginning: vibey AF, vibrant connection, but quickly faded.
    • First bump: not even a week in, Jo said the passion-threshold hadn't been crossed; they slowed down.
    • Camping trip: distance noticed in subtle interactions.
    • Portland visit: high point — met her grandma + parents, roller skating, off-site Thai restaurant; Yahir tells GSmitty he might be starting to love Jo.
    • Phone calls: 3-hour nightly calls, but Yahir notices Jo's life seemed circular (waiting for ScribeUS updates).
    • Pre-Kentucky: Jo comes down to get her job badge + see Yahir; first night minimal interaction, both working.
    • Show Beef night: Jo just falls asleep during the show; Yahir watches a couple episodes alone; "distant intimacy."
    • Salem trip cancelled: Yahir cancelled 3 meetings to spend day with her; she gives no acknowledgement; "it just felt like she didn't give a fuck anymore."
    • Pedicure date: hand-holding off, distant smile, "hadn't truly made her laugh in a long time."
    • The final straw: panda-express + Beef on his couch; she sat on opposite end; "Distant. No other word can describe it except for distant." Then she falls asleep.
    • The car conversation: 15-minute breakup; Jo is "relieved"; no major tears; awkward hug + "see ya later Jo."
    • Aftermath text: friend-type text from Jo letting him know she values their time together.
  • Jo's parting shot (the takeaway Yahir keeps replaying): when Yahir said he had put her on a pedestal, Jo asked "so our connection was contingent on that label?" and then said "I wonder when that would've come with you" — implying she was waiting for the asshole-version to emerge.
  • Yahir's processing question: should he reach out to ask how her first day as a scribe went? "This is something that I have a slight desire to do, after all she is the special person that was the reason for a lot of 'firsts' for you."
  • Embarrassment notice: only told Drip and Paige "because there is slight embarrassment that I only held a not even 2 month long relationship."

Pattern observed

The Jo arc precedes the Sam arc by 9 months and rhymes structurally:

  • Both: relationship that started high, faded fast, ended via a clear-eyed conversation.
  • Both: Yahir documents the specific moment of distance (Jo: pedicure; Sam: the lie about Jaden).
  • Both: the breakup-script-as-document is Yahir's processing tool.
  • The escape-via-travel pattern shows up in both — Jo breakup → immediate Kentucky trip; Sam breakup → Asia summer trip 8 weeks later.

This is the earliest evidence of Yahir's post breakup processing pattern — write the chronology, identify the inflection point, evaluate the parting shot, decide reach-out vs not.

Key quote

"In a very common and slippery way, we just fell out of connection and lost compatibility, the little that we had."

Open questions

  • Did Yahir send the "how was the first day as a scribe" text? (Note ends mid-deliberation.)
  • Who is Drip — first mention?
  • Did the kids-make-him-tear-up observation foreshadow anything specific in his life since? (Per 2026 02 26 fall backwards into void: yes — "tender, butterfly with my children" framing.)
